prompts.name: Rainy Cafe Window
prompts.text: Place the subject by a café window during rain, with soft indoor warmth, wet glass, muted daylight, and cozy reflective mood.

prompts.name: Sunlit Library
prompts.text: Place the subject in a library with sunlight through tall windows, dust motes, warm wood, and quiet scholarly beauty.

prompts.name: Rooftop Sunset
prompts.text: Place the subject on a rooftop at sunset with warm sky colors, city depth, wind, and cinematic atmosphere.

prompts.name: Bedroom Morning
prompts.text: Place the subject in a cozy bedroom during morning light, with soft bedding, gentle shadows, and relaxed intimacy.

prompts.name: Night Train
prompts.text: Place the subject inside a train at night with window reflections, soft interior light, and quiet travel mood.

prompts.name: Misty Forest Path
prompts.text: Place the subject on a misty forest path with moss, filtered light, soft haze, and calm mystery.

prompts.name: Golden Beach
prompts.text: Place the subject on a beach during golden hour with warm light, soft waves, and relaxed coastal atmosphere.

prompts.name: Neon Rain Street
prompts.text: Place the subject on a rainy neon city street with reflective pavement, glowing signs, and stylish night color.

prompts.name: Shrine with Petals
prompts.text: Place the subject at a quiet shrine with drifting petals, stone paths, lanterns, and serene seasonal beauty.

prompts.name: Overcast Greenhouse
prompts.text: Place the subject inside a greenhouse on an overcast day with diffused light, glass, plants, and botanical calm.

prompts.name: Candlelit Castle Hall
prompts.text: Place the subject in a castle hall lit by candles and torches, with stone walls, banners, and noble atmosphere.

prompts.name: Blue-Lit Laboratory
prompts.text: Place the subject in a laboratory with soft blue lighting, glass equipment, clean surfaces, and thoughtful science mood.

prompts.name: Evening Market
prompts.text: Place the subject in an evening market with lanterns, stalls, warm crowds, food steam, and lively atmosphere.

prompts.name: Snowy Window Interior
prompts.text: Place the subject indoors by a window during snowfall, with warm interior light and quiet winter comfort.

prompts.name: Neon Arcade
prompts.text: Place the subject in an arcade with glowing screens, colorful machines, reflective floor, and playful energy.
